title: hs:shape dev-task frontmatter
description: Shape of one TASK-<n>.md frontmatter block under docs/product/shape/tasks/, as written by task_model.py. `serves` is a plain list of story ids -- 1-1/1-n/n-1 cardinality is expressed entirely by how many tasks list the same story id (or how many ids one task lists), with no schema-level special-case.

id.description: Parent-free, globally monotonic within the workspace tasks dir (max existing TASK-<n>.md filename + 1, never reused) -- an n-1 task cannot be parent-scoped to a single story.

serves.description: Story ids this task serves. One entry = 1-1 (or one of several 1-n tasks pointing at the same story); more than one entry = n-1 (one task serving several stories). Resolved against the PO story graph by serves_resolver.py, not validated here.

estimate.description: Free-form BA effort figure (e.g. an S/M/L-derived range) -- never the PO story's own size field.

depends_on.description: Other TASK-<n> ids this task depends on.
